Part.Source:
Event Start
txtSinTEGRA.LinkTarget = '_blank' txtSinTEGRA.Link = 'http://www.sintegra.gov.br/'
txtANTT.LinkTarget = '_blank' txtANTT.Link = 'https://consultapublica.antt.gov.br/Site/ConsultaRNTRC.aspx/ConsultaPublica/' LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
RetornaufFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &UfeCod, &CidCod)
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon196_PlacaObrigatorio, &TCon196_PlacaObrigatorio) tbSemPlaca.Visible = &TCon196_PlacaObrigatorio = 'N'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
&WebSession.Remove(!'EMPCOD') &WebSession.Remove(!'VEICOD') &WebSession.Remove(!'VEIPLA') VeiTip.TooltipText = "Tração ou Reboque Para MDF-e" CorCod.Visible = False &ComboCorCod.SetEmpty() &ComboCorCod.Visible = False VeiMarCod.Visible = False &ComboVeiMarCod.SetEmpty() &ComboVeiMarCod.Visible = False VeiCidCod.Visible = False &ComboVeiCidCod.SetEmpty() &ComboVeiCidCod.Visible = False VeiUfeCod.Visible = False &ComboVeiUfeCod.SetEmpty() &ComboVeiUfeCod.Visible = False Do 'LoadComboVeiUfeCod' Do 'LoadComboVeiCidCod' Do 'LoadComboVeiMarCod' Do 'LoadComboCorCod' Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EmpCod.Visible = False VeiCod.Visible = False VeiMarNom.Visible = False CorNom.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if &Mode = TrnMode.Delete btnProcuraProprietario.Visible = false else if &Mode = TrnMode.Insert Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_set = '1' &ComboCorCod.FromString('1') Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = '1' &ComboVeiMarCod.FromString('1') endif endif
CorNom.Visible = False VeiMarNom.Visible = False Combo_VeiMarCod.AddNewOptionText = "Nova marca..." Combo_CorCod.AddNewOptionText = "Nova cor..." &ErroMensagem = '' TableDadosProprietario.Visible = (VeiPro <> 'P')
EndEvent
Event After Trn
&VeiPla = VeiPla IF VeiSemPlc = true //VeiPla = '-'+trim(str(VeiCod)) &VeiPla = '-'+trim(padL(str(VeiCod),6,'0')) Endif
prcAtualizaVeiculo.Call(EmpCod, VeiCod, VeiPla)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WebSession.Set(!'EMPCOD', EmpCod.ToString().Trim()) &WebSession.Set(!'VEICOD', VeiCod.ToString().Trim()) &WebSession.Set(!'VEIPLA', VeiPla)
Return
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DobtnProcuraProprietario'
PromptCliente.Popup(EmpCod,VeiProCod) do 'loadProprietario' VeiProCod.SetFocus() VeiProRaz.SetFocus()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Combo_CorCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_get = !'<#NEW#>' &DefaultCorNom = Combo_CorCod.SelectedText_get Cor.PopUp(TrnMode.Insert, EmpCod, 0, &DefaultCorNom) Case Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_get = !'<#POPUP_CLOSED#>' &CorCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'CorCod', !'NEW', &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) &ComboSelectedValue = &WebSession.Get(!'CORCOD') &WebSession.Remove(!'CORCOD') Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboCorCod.FromString(&ComboSelectedValue) Otherwise &ComboCorCod.FromString(Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_get) &CorCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'CorCod', !'NEW', &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_get = !'<#POPUP_CLOSED#>' and &ComboSelectedValue = '' Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_set = &corCodSelectedValueOld &ComboCorCod.FromString(&corCodSelectedValueOld) endif
EndEvent
Event Combo_VeiMarCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_get = !'<#NEW#>' &DefaultVeiMarNom = Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedText_get MarcaVeiculo.PopUp(TrnMode.Insert, EmpCod, 0, &DefaultVeiMarNom) Case Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_get = !'<#POPUP_CLOSED#>' &VeiMarCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'VeiMarCod', !'NEW', &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) &ComboSelectedValue = &WebSession.Get(!'VEIMARCOD') &WebSession.Remove(!'VEIMARCOD') Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboVeiMarCod.FromString(&ComboSelectedValue) Otherwise &ComboVeiMarCod.FromString(Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_get) &VeiMarCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'VeiMarCod', !'NEW', &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_get = !'<#POPUP_CLOSED#>' and &ComboSelectedValue = '' Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = &marCodSelectedValueOld &ComboVeiMarCod.FromString(&marCodSelectedValueOld) endif
EndEvent
Event Combo_VeiCidCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ComboVeiCidCod.FromString(Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_get)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Combo_VeiUfeCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ComboVeiUfeCod = Combo_VeiUfeCod.SelectedValue_get
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
do 'LoadComboVeiCidCodDinamic'
EndEvent
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
VeiTar_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' VeiCap_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' VeiProRaz_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' VeiProCnpj_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' VeiProUf_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' VeiProRNTRCMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' VeiProIeMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' VeiPlaMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell'
DVPanel_UnnamedTable2_Cell.Class = !'Invisible'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboCorCod'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CorCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'CorCod', &Mode, &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboCorCod.FromString(&ComboSelectedValue) If &Mode = TrnMode.Display OR &Mode = TrnMode.Delete Combo_CorCod.Enabled = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if &Mode = TrnMode.Insert and &CorCod_Data.Count > 0 Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_set = &CorCod_Data.Item(1).ID endif
if &CorCod_Data.Count > 0 &corCodSelectedValueOld = &ComboSelectedValue endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboVeiMarCod'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VeiMarCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'VeiMarCod', &Mode, &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboVeiMarCod.FromString(&ComboSelectedValue) If &Mode = TrnMode.Display OR &Mode = TrnMode.Delete Combo_VeiMarCod.Enabled = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if &Mode = TrnMode.Insert and &VeiMarCod_Data.Count > 0 Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = &VeiMarCod_Data.Item(1).ID endif
if &VeiMarCod_Data.Count > 0 &marCodSelectedValueOld = &ComboSelectedValue endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboVeiCidCod'
if 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VeiCidCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'VeiCidCod', &Mode, &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboVeiCidCod.FromString(&ComboSelectedValue) If &Mode = TrnMode.Display OR &Mode = TrnMode.Delete Combo_VeiCidCod.Enabled = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &VeiCidCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculosCidade(&Context.EmpCod, &Mode, &VeiCod, &ComboVeiUfeCod, &ComboSelectedValue)
if &Mode = TrnMode.Insert Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_set = &CidCod.ToString() &ComboVeiCidCod = &CidCod If &Mode = TrnMode.Display OR &Mode = TrnMode.Delete Combo_VeiCidCod.Enabled = False EndIf Else Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboVeiCidCod.FromString(&ComboSelectedValue) If &Mode = TrnMode.Display OR &Mode = TrnMode.Delete Combo_VeiCidCod.Enabled = False EndIf EndIf
Endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboVeiUfeCod'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VeiUfeCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculos(!'VeiUfeCod', &Mode, &EmpCod, &VeiCod, &ComboSelectedValue) Combo_VeiUfeCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboVeiUfeCod = &ComboSelectedValue If &Mode = TrnMode.Display OR &Mode = TrnMode.Delete Combo_VeiUfeCod.Enabled = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if &ComboVeiUfeCod.IsEmpty() &ComboVeiUfeCod = &UfeCod Combo_VeiUfeCod.SelectedValue_set = &UfeCod Endif
EndSub
Event VeiPla.IsValid
FormataPlACA.Call(EmpCod, VeiPla, VeiPla) VerificaPlacaRepetida.Call(EmpCod, VeiCod, VeiPla, &ErroMensagem)
EndEvent
Event VeiProCod.IsValid
/* É preciso verificar o OldValue do VeiProCod pois, ao cadastrar, a transação executa o IsValid() de todos os campos e caso um proprietário não tenha o RNTRC, por exemplo, cadastrado no banco mas tenha informado-o na tela, o IsValid() vai recarregar o proprietário e sobrescrever este valor. */ If VeiProCod <> 0 and VeiProCod <> VeiProCod.GetOldValue() do 'loadProprietario' EndIf
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadComboVeiCidCodDinamic'
&VeiCidCod_Data = LoadDVComboVeiculosCidade(&Context.EmpCod, Trnmode.Insert, &VeiCod, &ComboVeiUfeCod, &ComboSelectedValue) Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_set = &ComboSelectedValue &ComboVeiCidCod.FromString(&ComboSelectedValue)
EndSub
Sub 'loadProprietario'
RetonaProprietarioVeiculo.Call(EmpCod,VeiProCod,VeiProCnpj,VeiProRaz,VeiProIe,VeiProUf, VeiProRNTRC)
EndSub
